title: Expand shell whitelist and file access for AI agent capabilities
goal: Shell 화이트리스트를 확장하고(pip, npm, node, python3, git, curl, wget, cat, grep, find, mkdir, cp, mv, touch, head, tail, wc, sort, uniq, diff), 파일 접근 범위를 사용자 홈 디렉토리와 프로젝트 루트까지 확장한다. 위험한 패턴 차단(rm -rf, sudo, curl|sh 등)은 유지한다.

test_requirements.case: Newly allowed commands pass policy check
test_requirements.expected: check_shell allows pip, git, curl, python3, mkdir, cp, mv, etc.
rm -rf, sudo, curl|sh, wget|sh still blocked
check_file allows paths under user home
check_file allows paths under project root
curl = medium, git = low, pip install = medium

constraints: Do not remove any existing blocked command from the blocklist
Do not weaken the dangerous pattern detection (rm -rf, |bash, |sh, sudo)
Keep protected internal files blocked (db, config.json, pair_token)
Existing tests must continue to pass
Do not modify orchestrator or intent router
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
